judge_result.notes: Artefact satisfies all three criteria — Australian/neutral spellings throughout, exhaustive input-to-output mapping with explicit completeness tracking, and both required canonical sections present with the correct headings. Activation cases align cleanly with expected verdicts: the description scopes write-path mapping and mutation auditing precisely enough to fire on canonical/paraphrase/name-mention inputs and stay quiet on unrelated or meta queries.
